description:
Draft brings bookmarks, notes, tasks, and projects into one focused workspace.

SAVE WHAT YOU WANT TO RETURN TO
Paste links, add screenshots, and keep useful resources easy to find later.

WRITE AND PLAN
Capture ideas in notes, turn them into actionable tasks, and stay on top of everyday to-dos.

MOVE PROJECTS FORWARD
Create projects, set deadlines, organize tasks, follow progress, and use Kanban when you need a clear view of the work.

THINK WITH AI
Use the built-in AI assistant to brainstorm, summarize, and work through your next step.

SHARE WHEN IT HELPS
Invite specific people to view or edit selected bookmarks, notes, and projects.

Draft keeps the things that matter together, so you can focus on what comes next.

Terms of Use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
promotionalText: Save what matters. Manage bookmarks, take notes, track projects, and chat with AI.
